untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calculation of custom vertical count price objectives (Vup/Vdown) based on: (1) identifying reversal boxes in point-and-figure chart patterns, (2) counting first reversal boxes and minimum reversal boxes dynamically, and (3) computing formulas like 'Lowest box + (First reversal boxes × Minimum reversal boxes)'. These are proprietary point-and-figure pattern metrics that cannot be expressed using standard OHLCV indicators. The signal also requires detection of 'confirmed bottom or top formations' with specific pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The KAUFMAN_DRY_5 signal is a point-and-figure chart pattern analysis technique. While entry logic could theoretically use pivot levels as a proxy for reversal detection, the core calculation (vertical count objectives using box counts and reversal formulas) requires custom pattern recognition logic beyond standard technical indicators. A full implementation would require a dedicated point-and-figure module with box counting and reversal detection algorithms.
